cases.title: Verify login with valid credentials
cases.description: User should login successfully using valid credentials
cases.preconditions: User is on login page and has valid username & password
cases.postconditions: User should be logged in and dashboard should be visible

steps.action:
1\. Open application
2\. Enter valid username
3\. Enter valid password
4\. Click Login
steps.expected_result: User should be successfully logged in and dashboard should be displayed

cases.title: Verify login with invalid credentials
cases.description: Check system behavior for invalid login
cases.preconditions: User must be on Login page
cases.postconditions: System should not allow access to the dashboard.

steps.action:
1\. Open the HWC application\.
2\. Navigate to the Login page\.
3\. Enter an invalid username\.
4\. Enter an invalid password\.
5\. Click on the Login button\.
steps.expected_result:
1\. System should display a proper error message\.
2\. User should not be logged in\.
3\. Dashboard should not be accessible\.

cases.title: Blank username & password
cases.description: Verify system behavior when user tries to login with blank username and password fields.
cases.preconditions:
1\. User must be on the Login page\.
2\. Application should be accessible\.
cases.postconditions:
1\. No user session should be created\.
2\. User should remain on the Login screen\.

steps.action:
1\. Leave the Username field blank\.
2\. Leave the Password field blank\.
3\. Click on the Login button\.
steps.expected_result:
1\. Validation error message should be displayed\.
2\. Login should not be allowed\.
3\. User should remain on the Login page\.

cases.title: Verify beneficiary list is displayed when Registration page opens
cases.description: Check that when the Registration page is opened, the complete list of beneficiaries is displayed automatically.
cases.preconditions:
1\. User must be logged into the HWC application\.
2\. At least one beneficiary must exist in the system\.
3\. Application should be accessible\.
cases.postconditions:
1\. Beneficiary list should remain visible on the Registration page\.
2\. No data should be altered\.

steps.action:
1\. Login to the HWC application with valid credentials\.
2\. Navigate to the Registration module\.
3\. Open the Registration page\.
steps.expected_result:
1\. Registration page should load successfully\.
2\. All existing beneficiaries should be displayed in the list automatically\.
3\. System should not show "No Record Found" when beneficiaries exist\.

cases.title: Validate Registration screen navigation and UI load
cases.description: Verify Registration screen opens correctly with all UI elements
cases.preconditions: User must be logged in and application should be accessible
cases.postconditions: Registration screen should remain open with all sections visible

steps.action: Click on "Registration" tab. 2. Select Registration button.
steps.expected_result: Registration screen should open. 2. Beneficiary consent popup should appear. 3. On closing popup, Personal Info, Location Info, Other Info sections, Reset, Submit and Search buttons should be visible.

cases.title: Add new beneficiary with all mandatory and non-mandatory fields and move to Nurse
cases.description: Verify that a new beneficiary can be successfully registered by filling all mandatory and non-mandatory fields and user is navigated to Nurse module
cases.preconditions:
1\. User must be logged into HWC application\.
2\. User must have access to Registration module\.
3\. Application should be accessible\.
cases.postconditions:
1\. New beneficiary record should be created in the system\.
2\. User session should remain active\.
3\. Nurse module should be ready to start consultation for the registered beneficiary\.

steps.action:
1\. Navigate to Registration module\.
2\. Accept the beneficiary consent popup\.
3\. Enter all mandatory and non\-mendatory details in Personal information\, Location\, other and ABHA information\(Name\, Age\, Gender\, Mobile Number\, Aadhaar/ID\, Address\, etc\.\)\.
5\. Select appropriate options from radio buttons\, dropdowns and checkboxes\.
6\. Verify all entered data\.
7\. Click on Submit button\.
8\. Observe the success popup\.
9\. Click on Continue / Proceed button to move ahead\.
steps.expected_result:
1\. Registration should be completed successfully\.
2\. Success message should be displayed\.
3\. A unique Beneficiary ID should be generated\.
4\. Beneficiary details should be saved in the system\.
5\. User should be navigated to the Nurse module automatically\.

cases.title: Validate mandatory field validations
cases.description: Verify validation messages for blank mandatory fields
cases.preconditions: User must be on Registration form
cases.postconditions: User should remain on Registration form

steps.action: Leave mandatory fields blank (Gender, Name, Age). 2. Click Submit.
steps.expected_result: Validation messages should be displayed. 2. Form should not submit.

cases.title: Validate Search using Mobile Number and Beneficiary ID
cases.description: Verify search functionality returns correct beneficiary
cases.preconditions: Beneficiary must exist in system
cases.postconditions: Search results should be visible

steps.action: Navigate to Registration. 2. Click Search. 3. Search using valid Mobile Number. 4. Search using valid Beneficiary ID.
steps.expected_result: Matching beneficiary details should be displayed correctly.

cases.title: Validate Beneficiary ID auto generation
cases.description: Verify system generates unique Beneficiary ID
cases.preconditions: User must fill valid registration data
cases.postconditions: Beneficiary should be created in system

steps.action: Fill Registration form. 2. Click Submit. 3. Observe success popup.
steps.expected_result: Unique Beneficiary ID should be generated. 2. Success message should be displayed.

cases.title: Validate Advance Search functionality
cases.description: Verify advance search returns correct records
cases.preconditions: Beneficiary data must exist
cases.postconditions: Search results should be visible

steps.action: Click Advance Search. 2. Enter valid search criteria (Name/Mobile/Village). 3. Click Search.
steps.expected_result: Matching beneficiary records should be displayed.

cases.title: Validate Back to Registration from Family Tagging
cases.description: Verify navigation back from Family Tagging screen
cases.preconditions: User must complete registration
cases.postconditions: Registration screen should be visible

steps.action: Complete beneficiary registration. 2. Proceed to Family Tagging screen. 3. Click Back to Registration button.
steps.expected_result: User should be navigated back to Registration screen.

cases.title: Validate beneficiary consent popup acceptance
cases.description: Verify consent popup works properly
cases.preconditions: User must be logged in
cases.postconditions: User should be on active Registration form

steps.action:
1\. Navigate to Registration\. 
2\. Observe consent popup\.
3\. Click ACCEPT button\.
steps.expected_result:
1\. Popup should close\. 
2\. Registration form should be enabled\.

cases.title: Verify ABHA is created successfully
cases.description: Verify that ABHA (Ayushman Bharat Health Account) is created successfully for a beneficiary
cases.preconditions:
1\. User must be logged into HWC application\.
2\. Beneficiary must be registered in the system\.
3\. User must have access to ABHA creation module\.
4\. Valid Aadhaar/Mobile details must be available for ABHA creation\.
cases.postconditions:
1\. Beneficiary profile should be updated with ABHA details\.
2\. User should remain on beneficiary dashboard or be redirected to next workflow screen\.

steps.action:
* Login to the application with valid credentials.
* Search and select a beneficiary.
* Navigate to the ABHA module.
* Click on *Create ABHA*.
* Enter all mandatory details for ABHA creation.
* Submit the ABHA creation form.
* Observe the success message.
steps.expected_result:
* ABHA should be created successfully.
* System should show a success confirmation message.
* ABHA number and basic details should be generated.

cases.title: Verify View ABHA Details shows latest created ABHA information
cases.description: Search and select the same beneficiary for whom ABHA was created.
cases.preconditions:
* Latest created ABHA details should be displayed.
* ABHA number, name, DOB, gender, and other related information should match with the newly created ABHA.

steps.action:
* Login to the application with valid credentials.
* Search and select the same beneficiary for whom ABHA was created.
* Navigate to the ABHA module.
* Click on *View ABHA Details*.
* Observe the displayed ABHA information.
steps.expected_result:
* Latest created ABHA details should be displayed.
* ABHA number, name, DOB, gender, and other related information should match with the newly created ABHA.

cases.title: verify family tagging button visibility and family tagging screen ui
cases.description: verify that family tagging button is visible on clicking edit beneficiary and on opening family tagging screen all main buttons are visible
cases.preconditions:
1. user must be logged into hwc application.
2. beneficiary must be registered in the system.
cases.postconditions: family tagging screen should remain open.

steps.action: login to hwc application.
steps.expected_result: family tagging button should be visible on edit beneficiary screen.

steps.action: search any existing beneficiary.
steps.expected_result: family tagging page should open successfully.

steps.action: click on edit beneficiary option.
steps.expected_result:
following buttons should be visible:
• search family
• create family
• back to registration

steps.action: verify family tagging button is visible.
click on family tagging button.

cases.title: verify create new family member and display in family list
cases.description: verify that a new family member can be created and all created family members are shown in the list
cases.preconditions:
1. user must be on family tagging screen.
2. family should be created or selected.
cases.postconditions: family member data should be saved successfully.

steps.action: click on create family or add member button.
steps.expected_result: new family member should be created successfully.

steps.action: fill new family member details with valid data.
steps.expected_result: created family member should appear in the family member list.

steps.action: click on save button.
steps.expected_result: all existing family members should be displayed in the list.

cases.title: verify search family using family name and family id
cases.description: verify that searching family using all valid details and family id shows created family members
cases.preconditions:
1. at least one family and family member must be created.
2. user must be on family tagging screen.
cases.postconditions: user should remain on family tagging screen with search results visible.

steps.action: click on search family button.
steps.expected_result: created family member should be displayed in search result.

steps.action: enter all mandatory search details.
steps.expected_result: family details should match the created data.

steps.action: click search.
steps.expected_result: search using family id should also show same family details.

steps.action: again search using valid family id.

cases.title: verify back to registration navigation
cases.description: verify that clicking back to registration navigates user to registration screen
cases.preconditions: 1. user must be on family tagging screen.
cases.postconditions: registration screen should be visible.

steps.action: click on back to registration button.
steps.expected_result: user should be navigated back to registration screen successfully.

cases.title: verify registered beneficiary is visible in nurse module and visit flow shows follow up, screening, chief complaint and referral fields
cases.description: verify that newly registered beneficiary is displayed in nurse module and nurse can proceed with beneficiary visit where follow up, screening, chief complaint and referral fields are available
cases.preconditions:
1\. user must be logged into hwc application with nurse role\.
2\. beneficiary must be successfully registered in the system\.
3\. application should be accessible\.
cases.postconditions:
1\. nurse should be on beneficiary visit details screen\.
2\. visit workflow should be ready for further data entry\.

steps.action:
1\. login to hwc application with nurse credentials\.
2\. navigate to nurse module\.
3\. search the newly registered beneficiary using name / mobile number / beneficiary id\.
4\. verify beneficiary appears in the list\.
5\. select the beneficiary\.
6\. click on start visit / proceed option\.
7\. navigate to beneficiary visit details screen\.
8\. observe the visit form sections\.
steps.expected_result:
1\. registered beneficiary should be visible in nurse module list\.
2\. beneficiary visit should start successfully\.
3\. follow up section should be visible\.
4\. screening section should be visible\.
5\. chief complaint field should be available and editable\.
6\. referral field should be available and selectable\.

cases.title: verify nurse search beneficiary functionality
cases.description: verify that nurse can search beneficiary using mobile number, beneficiary id and name and correct records are displayed
cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and beneficiaries exist in system
cases.postconditions: search result should be displayed correctly

steps.action: login as nurse.2. go to nurse worklist.3. click on search option.4. search using beneficiary id.5. search using mobile number.6. search using beneficiary name.
steps.expected_result: correct beneficiary record should be displayed for each search type.2. beneficiary details like id, name, age and gender should match the searched data.3. no irrelevant records should be shown.

cases.title: verify mmu referred beneficiary moves and appears in mmu referred list
cases.description: verify that when a beneficiary is referred to mmu from nurse module, the beneficiary is moved and visible in mmu referred beneficiary list
cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and beneficiary exists, mmu module accessible
cases.postconditions: beneficiary should appear in mmu referred list

steps.action: login as nurse.2. select beneficiary from worklist.3. choose reason for visit as referral.4. select referral type as mmu.5. fill referral reason and facility.6. click save.7. logout and login to mmu module.8. open mmu referred beneficiary list.
steps.expected_result: beneficiary should be visible in mmu referred list.2. referral details should match the data entered by nurse.3. beneficiary status should be updated as mmu referred.

cases.title: verify anc new chief complaint visit successful submit with mandatory fields
cases.description: verify that anc new chief complaint visit is successfully submitted when all mandatory vitals and provisional diagnosis fields are filled
cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and pregnant beneficiary exists
cases.postconditions: anc new chief complaint visit should be saved successfully

steps.action: login as nurse.2. select pregnant beneficiary.3. click ok.4. choose reason for visit as new chief complaint.5. select anc.6. fill mandatory vitals (height, weight, bp).7. fill mandatory provisional diagnosis.8. complete history, examination and chief complaint sections.9. click save.
steps.expected_result: anc new chief complaint visit should be saved successfully.2. success message should be displayed.

cases.title: verify anc follow up visit successful submit with mandatory fields
cases.description: verify that anc follow up visit is successfully submitted when all mandatory vitals and provisional diagnosis fields are filled
cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and pregnant beneficiary exists
cases.postconditions: anc follow up visit should be saved successfully

steps.action: login as nurse.2. select pregnant beneficiary.3. click ok.4. choose reason for visit as follow up.5. select anc.6. fill mandatory vitals (height, weight, bp).7. fill mandatory provisional diagnosis.8. fill non-mandatory fields if required.9. click save.
steps.expected_result: anc follow up visit should be saved successfully.2. success message should be displayed.

cases.title: verify anc referral visit successful submit with mandatory fields
cases.description: verify that anc referral visit is successfully submitted when all mandatory vitals, provisional diagnosis and referral fields are filled
cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and pregnant beneficiary exists
cases.postconditions: anc referral visit should be saved successfully

steps.action: login as nurse.2. select pregnant beneficiary.3. click ok.4. choose reason for visit as referral.5. select anc.6. fill mandatory vitals (height, weight, bp).7. fill mandatory provisional diagnosis.8. fill referral fields (referral reason, referral facility).9. click save.
steps.expected_result: anc referral visit should be saved successfully.2. success message should be displayed.

cases.title: verify anc mandatory field error popup for new chief complaint, follow up and referral
cases.description: verify that error popup is shown when mandatory vitals, provisional diagnosis or referral fields are missing in any anc visit type
cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and pregnant beneficiary exists
cases.postconditions: anc visit should not be saved

steps.action: login as nurse.2. select pregnant beneficiary.3. click ok.4. choose reason for visit as new chief complaint and select anc.5. leave mandatory vitals (height, weight, bp) and provisional diagnosis blank.6. click save and observe error popup.7. now choose reason for visit as follow up and repeat step 5–6.8. now choose reason for visit as referral, leave referral reason and referral facility also blank and click save.
steps.expected_result: error popup should be displayed for all three flows (new chief complaint, follow up, referral).2. validation messages should be shown for mandatory vitals, provisional diagnosis and referral fields.3. form should not be submitted in any case.

cases.title: verify fp new chief complaint visit successful submit with mandatory fields
cases.description: verify that fp new chief complaint visit is successfully submitted when all mandatory vitals and family planning fields are filled
cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and eligible woman beneficiary exists
cases.postconditions: fp new chief complaint visit should be saved successfully

steps.action: login as nurse.2. select eligible woman beneficiary.3. click ok.4. choose reason for visit as new chief complaint.5. select fp & contraceptive services.6. fill mandatory vitals (height, weight, bp).7. fill mandatory family planning fields (method, adoption date, status).8. enter provisional diagnosis if applicable.9. click save.
steps.expected_result: fp new chief complaint visit should be saved successfully.2. success message should be displayed.

cases.title: verify fp follow up visit successful submit with mandatory fields
cases.description: verify that fp follow up visit is successfully submitted when all mandatory vitals and family planning fields are filled

cases.postconditions: fp follow up visit should be saved successfully

steps.expected_result: fp follow up visit should be saved successfully.2. success message should be displayed.

cases.title: verify fp referral visit successful submit with mandatory fields

cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and eligible woman beneficiary exists
cases.postconditions: fp referral visit should be saved successfully

steps.action: login as nurse.2. select eligible woman beneficiary.3. click ok.4. choose reason for visit as referral.5. select fp & contraceptive services.6. fill mandatory vitals (height, weight, bp).7. fill mandatory family planning fields (method, adoption date, status).8. fill mandatory referral fields (referral reason, referral facility).9. click save.
steps.expected_result: fp referral visit should be saved successfully.2. success message should be displayed.

cases.title: verify fp mandatory field error popup for new chief complaint, follow up and referral
cases.description: verify that error popup is shown when mandatory vitals, family planning or referral fields are missing in any fp visit type
cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and eligible woman beneficiary exists
cases.postconditions: fp visit should not be saved

steps.action: login as nurse.2. select eligible woman beneficiary.3. click ok.4. choose reason for visit as new chief complaint and select fp & contraceptive services.5. leave mandatory vitals (height, weight, bp) blank and leave mandatory family planning fields (method, adoption date) blank.6. click save and observe error popup.7. now choose reason for visit as follow up and repeat step 5–6.8. now choose reason for visit as referral, leave mandatory referral fields (referral reason, referral facility) also blank and click save.
steps.expected_result: error popup should be displayed for all three flows (new chief complaint, follow up, referral).2. validation messages should be shown for mandatory vitals, family planning and referral fields.3. form should not be submitted in any case.

cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and beneficiary exists

cases.title: verify ncd screening mandatory fields and high risk identification
cases.description: verify that in ncd screening visit, visit details, history, vitals and screening mandatory fields (hypertension, diabetes, oral, cervical, breast) are validated, cbac form is filled and beneficiary moves to high risk
cases.preconditions: nurse/mpw/cho logged in, adult beneficiary exists
cases.postconditions: screening data saved and beneficiary flagged as high risk

steps.action: login as nurse/mpw/cho.2. select adult beneficiary from worklist.3. click ok.4. choose reason for visit as new chief complaint.5. select visit category as ncd screening.6. complete visit details and history.7. fill vitals (height, weight, bp, sugar).8. in screening section, enter mandatory data for hypertension, diabetes, oral cancer, cervical cancer and breast cancer.9. fill cbac form.10. click find status and then save.
steps.expected_result: screening visit should be saved successfully.2. beneficiary should be marked as high risk.3. cbac form data should be saved.4. success message should be displayed.

steps.expected_result: ncd care follow up visit should be saved successfully.2. success message should be displayed.

cases.title: verify neonatal age criteria validation and movement to nurse module
cases.description: verify that when a neonatal baby is registered within valid age (in days), the beneficiary moves correctly to nurse module
cases.preconditions: neonatal beneficiary registered with valid age in days
cases.postconditions: beneficiary should appear in nurse worklist

cases.title: verify neonatal visit save with mandatory birth history, vitals, immunization and screening
cases.description: verify that neonatal visit is saved successfully for new chief complaint, follow-up and referral when mandatory birth history, vitals, immunization service and screening are filled
cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and neonatal beneficiary selected
cases.postconditions: neonatal visit should be saved successfully

steps.action: select neonatal beneficiary.2. click ok.3. choose reason for visit (new chief complaint / follow-up / referral).4. select neonatal & infant healthcare.5. fill birth history mandatory fields.6. fill vitals (weight, temperature etc.).7. select immunization service.8. complete screening section.9. click save.
steps.expected_result: visit should be saved successfully.2. success message should be shown.3. neonatal screening and immunization data should be stored.

cases.title: verify child age criteria validation and movement to nurse module
cases.description: verify that when a child/adolescent beneficiary is registered with valid age criteria, the beneficiary moves correctly to nurse module
cases.preconditions: child/adolescent registered with valid age
cases.postconditions: beneficiary should appear in nurse worklist

steps.action: register a child beneficiary with valid age as per system rules.2. complete registration.3. login as nurse.4. open nurse worklist.
steps.expected_result: child beneficiary should appear in nurse worklist.2. age should be shown correctly.

cases.title: verify child visit save with mandatory birth history, vitals, immunization and screening
cases.description: verify that child/adolescent visit is saved successfully for new chief complaint, follow-up and referral when mandatory birth history, vitals, immunization service and screening are filled
cases.preconditions: nurse logged in and child beneficiary selected
cases.postconditions: child visit should be saved successfully

steps.action: select child beneficiary.2. click ok.3. choose reason for visit (new chief complaint / follow-up / referral).4. select childhood & adolescent health care services.5. fill birth history mandatory fields.6. fill vitals (height, weight, temperature, etc.).7. select immunization service if applicable.8. complete screening section.9. click save.
steps.expected_result: visit should be saved successfully.2. success message should be displayed.3. immunization and screening data should be recorded correctly.

cases.title: verify doctor search beneficiary by beneficiary id
cases.description: verify that doctor can search beneficiary using beneficiary id and correct record is displayed
cases.preconditions: doctor logged in and beneficiary exists in system
cases.postconditions: searched beneficiary record should be displayed correctly

steps.action: login as doctor.2. navigate to doctor module/worklist.3. click on search option.4. enter valid beneficiary id.5. click on search.
steps.expected_result: correct beneficiary record should be displayed.2. beneficiary id, name, age and gender should match the searched id.3. doctor should be able to open the beneficiary record.

cases.title: verify nurse entered beneficiary details are visible in doctor module and doctor can proceed further
cases.description: verify that all details entered by nurse (visit details, history, vitals, screening, provisional diagnosis, referral if any) are visible in doctor module and doctor can continue consultation
cases.preconditions: nurse has completed and saved beneficiary visit and doctor is logged in
cases.postconditions: doctor consultation process should be completed successfully

steps.action: login as doctor.2. navigate to doctor module/worklist.3. search and select the beneficiary sent from nurse side.4. open beneficiary record.5. verify visit details, history, vitals, screening, provisional diagnosis and referral details.6. proceed with doctor examination, diagnosis and prescription.7. save doctor consultation.
steps.expected_result: all nurse entered details should be visible correctly in doctor module.2. doctor should be able to add examination, diagnosis and prescription.3. doctor consultation should be saved successfully.4. beneficiary status should move to next workflow stage.

cases.title: verify doctor can view and update nurse filled visit details
cases.description: verify that doctor can view visit details, history, vitals and examination filled by nurse and update allowed fields
cases.preconditions: beneficiary visit completed in nurse module and moved to doctor queue
cases.postconditions: updated data saved successfully

steps.action: login as doctor.2. open doctor worklist.3. select beneficiary moved from nurse module.4. verify visit details, history, vitals and examination are visible.5. update allowed fields (vitals value/examination remarks).6. click save/update.
steps.expected_result: all nurse-entered details should be visible.2. updated values should be saved successfully.3. success message should be displayed.

cases.title: verify doctor case record mandatory field validation and successful submit
cases.description: verify that doctor case record cannot be saved without mandatory fields and is saved successfully after filling them
cases.preconditions: beneficiary opened in doctor module
cases.postconditions: case record saved successfully

steps.action: open beneficiary in doctor module.2. go to case record section.3. leave mandatory fields (provisional diagnosis, clinical observation) blank.4. click save and observe error popup.5. fill provisional diagnosis and clinical observation.6. click save again.
steps.expected_result: error popup should appear when mandatory fields are missing.2. after filling mandatory fields, case record should be saved successfully.

cases.title: verify doctor can raise investigation and beneficiary moves to lab technician module
cases.description: verify that doctor can add investigation details Like Test Name (ex. Hemoglobin) and beneficiary appears in lab technician worklist
cases.preconditions: case record submitted successfully
cases.postconditions: investigation request created and sent to lab

steps.action: open beneficiary in doctor module.2. go to investigation section.3. select lab tests based on disease.4. submit investigation.
steps.expected_result: investigation request should be generated.2. beneficiary should appear in lab technician module worklist.

cases.title: verify doctor can prescribe medicine and beneficiary moves to pharmacist module
cases.description: verify that doctor can prescribe medicines and beneficiary appears in pharmacist worklist
cases.preconditions: case record submitted successfully
cases.postconditions: prescription generated and sent to pharmacy

steps.action: open beneficiary in doctor module.2. go to prescription section.3. add medicines with dosage and duration.4. submit prescription.
steps.expected_result: prescription should be saved successfully.2. beneficiary should appear in pharmacist module worklist.

cases.title: verify complete case sheet creation after lab report and medicine dispense
cases.description: verify that after lab technician uploads report and pharmacist dispenses medicines, complete case sheet is generated for beneficiary
cases.preconditions: investigation and prescription already raised
cases.postconditions: complete case sheet available with all details

steps.action: wait until lab technician uploads lab report.2. wait until pharmacist dispenses medicines.3. login as doctor.4. open beneficiary record again.5. open case sheet.
steps.expected_result: lab test reports should be visible.2. prescribed medicines and dispense status should be visible.3. case sheet should show visit details, vitals, examination, diagnosis, investigation and prescription.4. beneficiary case should be marked as completed successfully.

cases.title: verify lab technician can view doctor sent beneficiary and investigation details
cases.description: verify that beneficiary sent by doctor for lab investigation is visible in lab technician module with correct test details
cases.preconditions: doctor has raised investigation request for beneficiary
cases.postconditions: beneficiary record remains available in lab module until processing is completed

steps.action: login as lab technician.2. open lab technician module.3. open worklist or investigation list.4. search and select beneficiary sent by doctor.5. open investigation details.
steps.expected_result: beneficiary should appear in lab technician worklist.2. beneficiary id, name, age and visit id should be visible.3. test names sent by doctor should be displayed correctly.4. investigation status should show as pending.

cases.title: verify lab technician can fill test results and submit to doctor
cases.description: verify that after filling proper results for all test names, lab technician can submit and results are sent back to doctor module
cases.preconditions: beneficiary available in lab technician module with pending investigation
cases.postconditions: investigation status updated and results visible in doctor module

steps.action: login as lab technician.2. open beneficiary investigation record.3. for each test name, enter valid test result values and remarks if required.4. upload report file if option is available.5. click submit or complete investigation.6. login as doctor.7. open same beneficiary record in doctor module.8. open investigation section.
steps.expected_result: investigation should be submitted successfully from lab module.2. investigation status should change to completed.3. test results entered by lab technician should be visible in doctor module.4. uploaded reports (if any) should be accessible to doctor.

cases.title: verify pharmacist can view doctor prescribed beneficiary list and prescription details
cases.description: verify that all beneficiaries for whom doctor has prescribed medicines are visible in pharmacist module with correct prescription details
cases.preconditions: doctor has generated and submitted prescription for beneficiary
cases.postconditions: beneficiary record remains in pharmacist module until medicines are dispensed

steps.action: login as pharmacist.2. open pharmacist module.3. open prescription/worklist screen.4. verify beneficiary list sent by doctor.5. select any beneficiary record.6. open prescription details.
steps.expected_result: all beneficiaries with doctor prescriptions should be visible.2. beneficiary id, name, age and visit id should be displayed correctly.3. prescribed medicines, dosage, frequency and duration should be shown correctly.4. prescription status should be shown as pending.

cases.title: verify pharmacist can dispense medicines and submit prescription successfully to doctor module
cases.description: verify that after dispensing medicines, pharmacist can submit and the prescription status is updated in doctor module
cases.preconditions: beneficiary prescription available in pharmacist module with pending status
cases.postconditions: prescription marked as dispensed and status updated in doctor module

steps.action: login as pharmacist.2. open pharmacist module.3. select beneficiary with pending prescription.4. verify medicine list and quantities.5. mark medicines as dispensed / issued.6. enter batch number, expiry date and remarks if required.7. click submit or complete dispense.8. login as doctor.9. open same beneficiary record in doctor module.10. open prescription section.
steps.expected_result: medicines should be dispensed successfully from pharmacist module.2. prescription status should change to completed/dispensed in pharmacist module.3. in doctor module, prescription status should be updated.4. doctor should be able to view dispensed medicine details.

cases.title: Validate logout functionality is working
cases.description: Verify that the user is able to logout successfully from the application after login.
cases.preconditions:
1\. User must have valid login credentials\.
2\. Application should be accessible\.
cases.postconditions:
1\. User should not have an active session\.
2\. System should redirect the user to the Login page\.

steps.action:
1\. Open the HWC application\.
2\. Enter valid username and password\.
3\. Click on the Login button\.
4\. After successful login\, click on the Logout button\.
steps.expected_result:
1\. User should be logged out successfully\.
2\. Login page should be displayed\.
3\. User session should be terminated\.
